name: ZELLWEGER SYNDROME
definition: CEREBROHEPATORENAL SYNDROME autosomal recessive peroxisomal disorder with disturbed myelination in oligodendrocytes

demographics.Path: ⇑ very long-chain fatty acids in plasma and fibroblasts

distribution: diffuse microgyria + regions of pachygyria, lissencephaly
discriminating_features: diffuse microgyria + regions of pachygyria, lissencephaly
subependymal germinolytic cysts in caudothalamic groove

MR: diffuse microgyria + regions of pachygyria, lissencephaly
subependymal germinolytic cysts in caudothalamic groove
